mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_link_label l WHERE

SELECT l.id, l.name, l.region, l.remark, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_link g WHERE g.label_id = l.id AND g.deleted_at IS NULL) AS linkCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_link_import_batch b WHERE b.label_id = l.id AND b.deleted_at IS NULL) AS fileCount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(b.total_rows) FROM group_link_import_batch b WHERE b.label_id = l.id AND b.deleted_at IS NULL), 0) AS totalRows, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(b.inserted_rows + b.adopted_rows) FROM group_link_import_batch b WHERE b.label_id = l.id AND b.deleted_at IS NULL), 0) AS successRows, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(b.failed_rows) FROM group_link_import_batch b WHERE b.label_id = l.id AND b.deleted_at IS NULL), 0) AS failedRows, (SELECT b2.source_file_name FROM group_link_import_batch b2 WHERE b2.label_id = l.id AND b2.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY b2.created_at DESC, b2.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS latestSourceFile, (SELECT b2.created_at FROM group_link_import_batch b2 WHERE b2.label_id = l.id AND b2.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY b2.created_at DESC, b2.id DESC LIMIT 1) AS latestImportedAt, CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM group_link_import_batch b WHERE b.label_id = l.id AND b.deleted_at IS NULL) = 0 THEN 'EMPTY' WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(b.failed_rows) FROM group_link_import_batch b WHERE b.label_id = l.id AND b.deleted_at IS NULL), 0) > 0 AND COALESCE((SELECT SUM(b.inserted_rows + b.adopted_rows) FROM group_link_import_batch b WHERE b.label_id = l.id AND b.deleted_at IS NULL), 0) > 0 THEN 'PARTIAL' WHEN COALESCE((SELECT SUM(b.failed_rows) FROM group_link_import_batch b WHERE b.label_id = l.id AND b.deleted_at IS NULL), 0) > 0 THEN 'FAILED' ELSE 'DONE' END AS status, l.created_at AS createdAt, l.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM group_link_label l WHERE ORDER BY l.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT * FROM group_link_label WHERE name = #{name} AND deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM group_link_label WHERE name = #{name} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM group_link_label WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_link_label (name, region, remark, created_at, updated_at, created_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{region}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE group_link_label SET deleted_at = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
